items.name_en: Deep 🍷 Wine Red 'Export Product' OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 25k Large Diamond Calfskin LP Box 👅👅 Black Gold! Play with the LP Box bag new large diamond pattern 🌟🌟 Version is very classic and atmospheric, the front double C is eye-catching and exquisite, calfskin material is not delicate at all!! Textured when carried by hand, and adds a casual elegance when worn on the chain. Easily adapts to different styles, can hold daily small items, turns heads when worn~ A definite fashion item ✓ Size: 17x19.5x5cm

items.name_en: Export Product Milk White! Small Size OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25B Affinity Duma Backpack The hottest one is definitely Duma, extremely high popularity🆙, finally returned to the classic 25B series🌟🌟. The classic quilted pattern is on the zipper puller and leather drawstring. The material is still calf leather. The black-gold color scheme is versatile and premium√. The leather is glossy and shiny👅👅, and it is wear-resistant. No need to worry too much when using~ The bag shape is compact and powerful! Casual and stylish when worn, practical and cute! Capacity is completely sufficient for commuting or travel. Size: 20X19 x12cm

items.name_en: Export Product! Size: 🀄️ ! Champion🏆 Quality⭐️⭐️⭐️ CHANEL 24S Denim 22bag, Jennie style. 🆕 New member of the 22bag family, rivet denim 22bag. Feels like the best denim series this season! Two sizes: Mini: 20x19x6, Small: 35x37x7. Jennie style, practical and durable for daily use. 🌟 The denim tone is perfect for the upcoming spring and summer. Pair with a camisole and skirt for a stunning look! Go for it, girls!

items.name_en: Extra Large Size⭐️⭐️⭐️ WCHANEL 24P hobo Extra Large. This season's hobo is really popular!! They all look good. If you are relatively thin, you can press down the logo area. It feels like pressing down the center zipper would look better and more casual. Tall girls should go for it! The size is really suitable, and the leather is durable, perfect for autumn and winter. Sweet cool vibe~ Petite girls can consider the small size, it's also very nice! Details: Light gold hardware with shiny calfskin, very textured! Underarm carry, there is a Chanel small logo on the chain from the front, very detailed! This SA was really hesitant to buy it or snatch it from someone else. The last one because the caviar leather is very durable. Size: 35x 23 x 11cm Style AS 4246

items.name_en: Full packaging, upgraded version with original factory leather
items.name_cn:
Full packaging, upgraded version with original factory leather
Full name: Classic Flap 1112 Large Ball, Grainy Ball Pattern
Size: 15.5*25.5*6.5cm
Leather: Original Haas Large Ball Caviar interior, imported lambskin
Hardware: 24K plated, all steel hardware
The classic CF has an irresistible charm, serving as a mobile label of elegance wherever you go. The pure white exudes an elegant and gentle goddess vibe, paired with a gold buckle for exquisite luxury. It is truly a must-have entry-level luxury item~

🇫🇷AS5293CHANEL 25 Another year-named model, 25c ball-grain leather hip-hop bag. Chanel hobo shoulder bag, boho shoulder bag, small size, vintage gold coin button drawstring bucket bag + quilted + vintage black and gold. Classic chain design, full of high-end feel! items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade, High Version
This miniature Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Fall Collection, stylish and practical. Crafted from white calfskin, it features oversized quilted stitching. The spacious internal compartment can hold various daily items. It features a slender leather drawstring closure for secure storage, and a light gold-finished metal CD Lock letter D turn-button clasp on the adjustable sides to elevate the style. The top leather handle comes with a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Model 2834
Dimensions 13×15×12cm
